desc: rari: High-performance React Server Components framework powered by a Rust runtime, delivering 18.1x faster response times (0.12ms vs 2.17ms) and 67.4x higher …
descFull: rari: High-performance React Server Components framework powered by a Rust runtime, delivering 18.1x faster response times (0.12ms vs 2.17ms) and 67.4x higher throughput (97,826 vs 1,452 req/sec) than Next.js with zero-config setup.
